title: Why did Shinji wank over a comatose Asuka
display_title: Why did Shinji wank over a comatose Asuka
wikitext:
[]: Why did Shinji wank over a comatose Asuka? Post by CyberXIII » Sat May 01, 2010 7:35 pm That makes absolutely no sense whatsoever. At some level, he's scared of her, on another, he loves her. While he's pretty much destroyed mentally at this point, I still don't see why he would do that. And don't say hormones. Those never led me to do something crazy like that.

[]: Post by scarmullet » Sat May 01, 2010 7:39 pm You mean you dont find comatose girls hot? man, I need to check my priorities.

[]: Re: Why did Shinji wank over a comatose Asuka? Post by planet news » Sat May 01, 2010 8:46 pm CyberXIII wrote: That makes absolutely no sense whatsoever.

[]: Post by Dartz » Sat May 01, 2010 8:53 pm This topic is so fucked up...

[]: Post by CyberXIII » Sat May 01, 2010 8:55 pm Depression doesn't really answer this, because that's more likely to make him kill himself.

[]: Post by ran1 » Sat May 01, 2010 9:00 pm Shinji is surrounded by world of pain He fears both Misato and Rei Retreats to Asuka in last attempt to find happiness Pleasure Principle kicks in "No harm done reasoning" *fap fap fap* feelsbadman.jpg That's essentially the core of what's happening, though I'll probably expand on these core ideas tommorow after a good night's rest.
